scope: single-seed K=8 dev-only frozen follow-up after transpose G0 rejection; new episodes; no training, checkpoint selection, stress, formal validation, or test
causal_contract: least_squares prior_context_t solves only equations from observations x_<t; x_t enters posterior_context_t and may first affect prediction at t+1
solver: for each pre-write content memory and neural place, construct R_t such that value_hat=R_t context; over the most recent 12 revealed observations solve (sum R_t^T R_t + relative ridge) context = sum R_t^T value_t and normalize
ridge_scaling: relative ridge times mean diagonal of the rolling Gram matrix plus the frozen HPC numerical epsilon
diagnostic_return_override: replace normal M1f context only at audit return probes with the causal least-squares context to test address precision; metadata chooses probe positions only and this arm is not deployable
memory_state: existing M1b content fast weights and covariance only; no context slots, candidate bank, second memory, cache, or learned parameters

classification_rule.IDENTITY_BUT_NOT_ADDRESS_PRECISION: causal pair identity passes but correct cosine, margin, or diagnostic fused accuracy fails
classification_rule.SIGNAL_TOO_LATE: same-step leaky identity passes but causal identity fails
classification_rule.LEAST_SQUARES_CONTEXT_SIGNAL_INSUFFICIEN: causal pair identity fails without a leaky-only recovery

model_change: none; diagnostic replay and return-probe intervention only
post_result_rule: only LEAST_SQUARES_CONTEXT_SIGNAL_CONFIRMED may unlock a deployable zero-parameter M1g pilot on another new dev seed
